entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A player has accepted one stable seat and the controlled private handoff surface opens.
required_facts: The player must review the inherited private seat state before authority transfer completes.
No other seat's private information may appear.

variants.spooky: Seat {seat}. Role: {private_role}. Faction: {private_faction}. Objective: {private_objective}. Condition: {private_condition}. Inventory: {private_inventory}.
variants.grim: Seat {seat}. Role: {private_role}. Faction: {private_faction}. Objective: {private_objective}. Condition: {private_condition}. Inventory: {private_inventory}.
variants.gore_and_dread: Seat {seat}. Role: {private_role}. Faction: {private_faction}. Objective: {private_objective}. Condition: {private_condition}. Inventory: {private_inventory}.

entries.fallback: Seat {seat}. Role: {private_role}. Faction: {private_faction}. Objective: {private_objective}. Condition: {private_condition}. Inventory: {private_inventory}.

entries.speaker: plain_system
entries.public_trigger: A returning player reclaims a reserved stable seat and receives its authorized private recap.
required_facts: The recap contains only state and information legitimately acquired by the reclaimed seat.
Surrogate decisions remain committed.

variants.spooky: While absent, this seat recorded: {private_recap}. Review the current state before resuming control.
variants.grim: While absent, this seat recorded: {private_recap}. Review the current state before resuming control.
variants.gore_and_dread: While absent, this seat recorded: {private_recap}. Review the current state before resuming control.

entries.fallback: While absent, this seat recorded: {private_recap}. Review the current state before resuming control.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation marks an authorized Bellmarked seat's private objective as completed.
required_facts: The Bellmarked private objective succeeded.
Public attribution occurs only if the faction was revealed or the ending policy authorizes it.

variants.spooky: The harbor remembers your service. Whether the company does is a separate ending.
variants.gore_and_dread: The bell keeps your name beneath its tongue. The signal survived because you fed it something living.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation marks an authorized Tidebound seat's private objective as completed.
required_facts: The Tidebound private objective succeeded.
The result does not erase separate Living, Restless, or Harbor outcomes.

variants.spooky: The tide carries your memory beyond the place where your footprints ended.
variants.gore_and_dread: Another coast receives the water inside you. The first drowned voice has already begun introducing itself.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation selects the Light Comes Home ending.
required_facts: The group or an eligible seat escaped.
An active Harbor signal crossed the ending boundary.

variants.spooky: You escaped the harbor. The harbor, displaying equal initiative, escaped inside the light you carried.
variants.grim: Escape succeeded, but an active Harbor signal crossed into the living world.
variants.gore_and_dread: The boat reaches shore. Behind every survivor, a lighthouse-shaped shadow begins turning across dry land.

entries.fallback: Escape succeeded, but an active Harbor signal crossed the boundary.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation selects the Names Erased ending.
required_facts: The active names were removed from the Harbor mechanism.
The fictional memory cost does not alter real profiles, saves, or account data.

variants.spooky: The bells can no longer ring your names. Whether those names still belong to you is outside their jurisdiction.
variants.grim: The active names were erased from the Harbor mechanism. No real profile or save data was changed.
variants.gore_and_dread: Ink lifts from the pages in long black threads. The harbor forgets whom it meant to drown, and the survivors forget why they are afraid of bells.

entries.fallback: The active names were erased from the Harbor mechanism.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation produces compatible successes and failures across multiple seats or factions.
required_facts: Each stable seat and faction receives separate authoritative attribution.
The ending must not collapse distinct outcomes into a universal victory or defeat.

variants.spooky: Some escaped living. Some departed changed. Some finished their work after death. The harbor will count each result differently.
variants.grim: Mixed outcome resolved. Review each stable-seat and faction result separately.
variants.gore_and_dread: The boat carries breaths, drowned memories, unfinished dead, and one light that should have stayed below. Every passenger won something different.

entries.fallback: Mixed outcome resolved. Review each stable-seat and faction result separately.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated Borrowed Breath card delays one eligible defeat resolution.
required_facts: The eligible defeat is delayed until the displayed action window ends.
The original consequence still resolves unless legally prevented.

variants.spooky: One breath is borrowed. Complete the permitted action before its owner asks for it back.
variants.grim: Borrowed Breath delayed the eligible defeat until the current action window ends.
variants.gore_and_dread: Air enters the lungs cold and used. One action remains before the drowned reclaim it.

entries.fallback: Borrowed Breath delayed the eligible defeat until the action window ends.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated One More Passenger card increases eligible lifeboat capacity under its authored rules.
required_facts: Lifeboat capacity increased by the accepted amount.
No new stable seat or automatic rescue was created.

variants.spooky: The lifeboat makes room for one more history. It does not promise a comfortable crossing.
variants.grim: Eligible lifeboat capacity increased by one. No passenger was moved automatically.
variants.gore_and_dread: The hull opens another wet place between the boards. One more body may leave, provided the boat still floats.

entries.fallback: Eligible lifeboat capacity increased by one.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated The Harbor Owes Me card recovers one eligible lost public resource or opportunity.
required_facts: The selected eligible resource or opportunity was recovered.
The authored Harbor debt marker or consequence was also applied.

variants.spooky: The harbor pays one old debt by creating a newer one.
variants.grim: The selected eligible loss was recovered. Apply the authored Harbor debt.
variants.gore_and_dread: The water returns what it stole with fingerprints that were not present before. The new debt is active.

entries.fallback: The selected eligible loss was recovered. Apply the Harbor debt.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated Wrong Bell card redirects one eligible public bell event.
required_facts: The eligible bell event was redirected to a legal public target category.
No hidden role, faction, objective, or target was exposed.

variants.spooky: The bell rings the wrong warning with perfect confidence.
variants.grim: The eligible bell event was redirected to the selected legal public target.
variants.gore_and_dread: The clapper strikes and the sound crawls toward another public mark, dragging the water behind it.

entries.fallback: The eligible bell event was redirected.
